plan_type_rationale: Stub category=test. Single-file test addition with no architecture impact.

phases.title: Write unit tests for inferLayerFromPath and inferCapabilityFromPath
phases.goal: Add describe blocks to header-generator.test.ts covering all canonical path-pattern branches of inferLayerFromPath and the slug-formation logic of inferCapabilityFromPath. Vitest suite must pass with no new failures.

tasks.description: Read src/semantic/header-generator.ts lines 86-119 to understand the full LAYER_PATTERNS table and inferCapabilityFromPath slug logic
Read src/semantic/header-generator.test.ts to find the correct import path and existing describe structure

Add describe('inferLayerFromPath') block: test each canonical prefix (src/cli/, src/pipeline/, src/scanner/, src/semantic/, src/integration/, src/rag/, src/query/, src/analyzer/, src/adapter/, src/context/, src/export/, src/plugins/, src/types/, src/utils/, src/cache/, src/validator/, __tests__/, scripts/, src/ root) returns the expected layer string; test unknown path returns undefined

Add describe('inferCapabilityFromPath') block: test that the function returns a kebab-case slug from filename stem + element name, test multi-word filenames produce correct slugs, test empty element name falls back gracefully
Run npx vitest src/semantic/header-generator.test.ts — confirm all new tests pass and no existing tests regress
Commit the test additions to main

acceptance_criteria: inferLayerFromPath: at least 8 canonical path prefixes have an explicit test case
inferLayerFromPath: unknown path → undefined is tested
inferCapabilityFromPath: kebab-case slug formation verified for at least 3 distinct filename/element combinations
vitest run: 0 new failures, all new tests green
No changes to inferLayerFromPath or inferCapabilityFromPath implementation
